command_description: Bold some text
Italicize some text
Make some text plain
Reformat some text. Similar to WordService's Reformat service.
Scroll to and animate some text.
Strike some text
Unbold some text
Underline some text
Unitalicize some text
Unstrike some text
Ununderline some text
Add user-defined metadata to a record or updates already existing metadata of a record. Setting a value for an unknown key automatically adds a definition to Settings > Data.

parameters.name: for
parameters.label: for
parameters.description: The key for the user-defined value.

parameters.name: to
parameters.label: to
parameters.description: The record.

parameters.name: as
parameters.label: as
parameters.description: The desired format. Either 'text' (default), 'richtext', 'string', 'uuid', 'url', 'crosslink', 'date', 'real', 'int', 'bool', 'set', 'countries' or 'languages'.

result_description: True if adding was successful, false if not.

parameters.label: referrer
parameters.description: The HTTP referrer.

parameters.name: user
parameters.label: user
parameters.description: The user name for protected websites.

result_description: True if adding was successful, false if not.

parameters.name: in

parameters.description: The database. Uses current database if not specified

result_description: The records with the specified comment.

command_description: Lookup records with specified content hash.

parameters.name: in
parameters.label: in
parameters.description: The database. Uses current database if not specified

result_description: The records with the specified content hash.

command_description: Lookup records whose last path component is the specified file.

parameters.name: in
parameters.label: in
parameters.description: The database. Uses current database if not specified

result_description: The records with the specified file.

command_description: Lookup records with specified path.

parameters.name: in
parameters.label: in
parameters.description: The database. Uses current database if not specified.

result_description: The records with the specified path.

command_description: Lookup records with all or any of the specified tags.

parameters.name: any
parameters.label: any
parameters.description: Lookup any or all (default) tags.

parameters.name: in
parameters.label: in
parameters.description: The database. Uses current database if not specified.

result_description: The found records.

command_description: Lookup records with specified URL.

parameters.name: in
parameters.label: in
parameters.description: The database. Uses current database if not specified.

result_description: The records with the specified URL.

command_description: Merge either a list of records as an RTF(D)/a PDF document or merge a list of not indexed groups/tags.

parameters.name: in
parameters.label: in
parameters.description: The destination group for the merged record. The root of the database is used if not specified.

parameters.name: records
parameters.label: records
parameters.description: The records to merge.

result_description: The merged record.

command_description: Move all instances of a record to a different group.  Specify the 'from' group to move a single instance to a different group.

parameters.name: record
parameters.label: record
parameters.description: The record(s) to move. Indexed items are not supported by revision-proof databases.

parameters.name: from
parameters.label: from
parameters.description: The source group. Only applicable if record and destination group are in the same database

parameters.name: to
parameters.label: to
parameters.description: The destination group which doesn't have to be in the same database.

result_description: The moved record(s).

command_description: Move an external/indexed record (and its children) into the database. Not supported by revision-proof databases.

parameters.name: record
parameters.label: record
parameters.description: The record to move.

result_description: True if moving was successful, false if not.

command_description: Move an internal/imported record (and its children) to the enclosing external folder in the filesystem. Creation/Modification dates, Spotlight comments and OpenMeta tags are immediately updated. Not supported by revision-proof databases.

parameters.name: record
parameters.label: record
parameters.description: The record to move.

parameters.name: to
parameters.label: to
parameters.description: The POSIX path or file URL of the destination folder. Only supported by documents.

result_description: True if moving was successful, false if not.

command_description: Open an existing database.
result_description: The opened database.

command_description: Open a new tab for the specified URL or record in a think window.

parameters.name: record
parameters.label: record
parameters.description: The record to open.

parameters.name: URL
parameters.label: URL
parameters.description: The URL to open.

parameters.name: referrer
parameters.label: referrer
parameters.description: The HTTP referrer.

parameters.name: in
parameters.label: in
parameters.description: The optional think window that should open a new tab. A new window is used otherwise.

result_description: The opened tab.

command_description: Open a (new) main or document window for the specified record. Only recommended for main windows, use 'open tab for' for document windows.

parameters.name: record
parameters.label: record
parameters.description: The record to open.

parameters.name: enforcement
parameters.label: enforcement
parameters.description: Enforce DEVONthink to always open a new window, even if the record is already opened in one. Off by default.

result_description: The opened window.

command_description: Backup & optimize a database.

parameters.name: database
parameters.label: database
parameters.description: The database to optimize.

result_description: True if optimizing was successful, false if not.

command_description: Create a new record with the contents of the clipboard.

parameters.name: to
parameters.label: to
parameters.description: The destination group for the new record. Uses incoming group or group selector if not specified.

result_description: The pasted record.

command_description: Perform one or all smart rules.

parameters.name: name
parameters.label: name
parameters.description: The name of the smart rule. All smart rules are used if not specified.

parameters.name: record
parameters.label: record
parameters.description: The record. All records matching the smart rule(s) conditions are used if no record is specified.

parameters.name: trigger
parameters.label: trigger
parameters.description: The optional event to trigger smart rules.

result_description: True if performing was successful, false if not.

command_description: Refresh a record. Currently only supported by feeds but not by revision-proof databases.

parameters.name: record
parameters.label: record
parameters.description: The record to refresh.

result_description: True if refreshing was successful, false if not.

command_description: Replicate a record.

parameters.name: record
parameters.label: record
parameters.description: The record(s) to replicate.

parameters.name: to
parameters.label: to
parameters.description: The destination group which must be in the same database.

result_description: The replicated record(s).

command_description: Restore saved version of a record.

parameters.name: version
parameters.label: version
parameters.description: The saved version. The record of the version is automatically retrieved.

result_description: True if restoring was successful, false otherwise.

command_description: Save version of current record. NOTE: Use this command right before editing the contents, not afterwards, as duplicates are automatically removed.

parameters.name: record
parameters.label: record
parameters.description: The record.

result_description: The saved version.

command_description: Save a workspace.
result_description: True if saving was successful, false if not.

command_description: Search for records in specified group or all databases.

direct_parameter.name: direct
direct_parameter.description: The search string. Supports keys, operators and wildcards.

parameters.name: comparison
parameters.label: comparison
parameters.description: The comparison to use (default no case).

parameters.name: exclude subgroups
parameters.label: exclude subgroups
parameters.description: Don't search in subgroups of the specified group. Off by default.

parameters.name: in
parameters.label: in
parameters.description: The group to search in. Searches in all databases if not specified.

result_description: The found records.

command_description: Set cell at specified position of a sheet.

direct_parameter.name: direct
direct_parameter.description: The tab, window or record of a sheet.

parameters.name: column
parameters.label: column
parameters.description: Either the index (1...n) or the name of the column of the cell.

parameters.name: row
parameters.label: row
parameters.description: The row (1...n) of the cell.

parameters.name: to
parameters.label: to
parameters.description: The content of the cell.

result_description: True if setting was successful, false if not.

command_description: Show a progress indicator or update an already visible indicator. You have to ensure that the indicator is hidden again via 'hide progress indicator' when the script ends or if an error occurs.

parameters.name: cancel button
parameters.label: cancel button
parameters.description: Display a button to cancel the process.

parameters.name: steps
parameters.label: steps
parameters.description: The number of steps of the progress or a negative value for an indeterminate number.

result_description: True if showing was successful, false if not.

command_description: Perform search in frontmost main window. Opens a new main window if there's none.

direct_parameter.name: direct
direct_parameter.description: The search string. Supports keys, operators and wildcards.

parameters.name: comparison
parameters.label: comparison
parameters.description: The comparison to use (default no case).

parameters.name: exclude subgroups
parameters.label: exclude subgroups
parameters.description: Don't search in subgroups of the specified group. Off by default.

result_description: True if the search was performed, false if not.

command_description: Start queue of download manager.
result_description: True if starting was successful, false if not.

command_description: Go to next step of a progress.

direct_parameter.name: direct
direct_parameter.description: The info for the current step.

result_description: True if stepping was successful, false if not.

command_description: Stop queue of download manager.
result_description: True if stopping was successful, false if not.

command_description: Summarize highlights & annotations of records. PDF, RTF(D), Markdown and web documents are currently supported.

parameters.name: in
parameters.label: in
parameters.description: The destination group for the summary. The current group of the database is used if not specified.

parameters.name: records
parameters.label: records
parameters.description: The records to summarize.

parameters.name: to
parameters.label: to
parameters.description: The desired format. Only 'markdown', 'rich' and 'sheet' are currently supported.

result_description: The created record.

command_description: Summarize content of records.

parameters.name: in
parameters.label: in
parameters.description: The destination group for the summary. The current group of the database is used if not specified.

parameters.name: records
parameters.label: records
parameters.description: The records to summarize.

parameters.name: to
parameters.label: to
parameters.description: The desired format. Only 'markdown', 'simple' and 'rich' are currently supported.

parameters.name: as
parameters.label: as
parameters.description: The desired summary style. If no value is specified the settings default is used.

result_description: The created record.

command_description: Summarize mentions of records.

parameters.name: in
parameters.label: in
parameters.description: The destination group for the summary. The current group of the database is used if not specified.

parameters.name: records
parameters.label: records
parameters.description: The records to summarize.

parameters.name: to
parameters.label: to
parameters.description: The desired format. Only 'markdown' and 'rich' are currently supported.

result_description: The created record.

command_description: Summarizes text.

parameters.name: as
parameters.label: as
parameters.description: The desired summary style. If no value is specified the settings default is used.

result_description: The summarized text.

command_description: Synchronizes records with the filesystem or databases with their sync locations. Only one of both operations is supported.

parameters.name: record
parameters.label: record
parameters.description: The (external) record to update. New items are added, updated ones indexed and obsolete ones removed. NOTE: This is rarely necessary as databases are usually automatically updated by filesystem events. In addition, revision-proof databases do not support this.

parameters.name: database
parameters.label: database
parameters.description: The database to synchronize via its sync locations.

result_description: True if synchronizing was successful, false if not.

command_description: Transcribes speech, text or notes of a record.

parameters.name: record
parameters.label: record
parameters.description: An audio record, a video record containing an audio track, a PDF document or an image.

parameters.name: language
parameters.label: language
parameters.description: ISO language code, e.g. 'en' or 'de'. If no value is specified the settings default is used.

parameters.name: timestamps
parameters.label: timestamps
parameters.description: Transcription should include timestamps or not. If no value is specified the settings default is used.

result_description: The transcribed text if successful.

command_description: Update text of a plain/rich text, Markdown document, formatted note or HTML page. Not supported by revision-proof databases.

parameters.name: record
parameters.label: record
parameters.description: The record to update.

parameters.name: with text
parameters.label: with text
parameters.description: The text which should be updated/set, inserted or appended.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.label: mode
parameters.description: The desired mode.

parameters.name: URL
parameters.label: URL
parameters.description: The URL of the text.

result_description: True if updating was successful, false if not.

command_description: Update existing thumbnail of a record. Thumbnailing is performed asynchronously in the background.

parameters.name: of
parameters.label: of
parameters.description: The record.

result_description: True if updating was successful, false if not.

command_description: Verify a database.

parameters.name: database
parameters.label: database
parameters.description: The database to verify.

result_description: Total number of errors, invalid filenames and missing files.

command_description: Converts a record to a new record and applies OCR.

parameters.name: record
parameters.label: record
parameters.description: A record containing an image

parameters.name: to
parameters.label: to
parameters.description: The destination group (by default the same group as the input record)

parameters.name: rotate by
parameters.label: rotate by
parameters.description: Rotates the incoming image page 0, 90, 180 or 270 degrees (by default it is automatic)

parameters.name: file type
parameters.label: file type
parameters.description: Specifies what type of file to convert to. If no value is specified the settings default is used.

parameters.name: waiting for reply
parameters.label: waiting for reply
parameters.description: Wait for reply (default) or perform the command in the background.

result_description: The converted record.

command_description: Imports a PDF document or image with OCR.

parameters.name: file
parameters.label: file
parameters.description: POSIX path or file URL of the image file.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.label: attributes
parameters.description: The PDF properties.

parameters.name: rotate by
parameters.label: rotate by
parameters.description: Rotates the incoming image page 0, 90, 180 or 270 degrees (by default it is automatic)

parameters.name: to
parameters.label: to
parameters.description: The destination group. Uses incoming group or group selector if not specified.

parameters.name: file type
parameters.label: file type
parameters.description: Specifies what type of file to convert to. If no value is specified the settings default is used.

parameters.name: waiting for reply
parameters.label: waiting for reply
parameters.description: Wait for reply (default) or perform the command in the background.

result_description: The OCRed record.

command_description: Returns list of imprinter configuration names
result_description: The configuration names.

command_description: Imprint the record with a given imprinter configuration. Not supported by revision-proof databases.

direct_parameter.name: direct
direct_parameter.description: The name of the imprinter configuration

parameters.name: to
parameters.label: to
parameters.description: The image or PDF record to imprint

parameters.name: waiting for reply
parameters.label: waiting for reply
parameters.description: Wait for reply (default) or perform the command in the background.

result_description: True if imprinting was successful, false if not.

command_description: Imprint the record with a configuration defined in the parameters. Not supported by revision-proof databases.

parameters.name: record
parameters.label: record
parameters.description: The image or PDF record to imprint

parameters.name: background color
parameters.label: background color
parameters.description: Color expressed as an RGB value consisting of a list of three color values from 0 to 65535. ex: Blue = {0, 0, 65535} (Optional).

parameters.name: border color
parameters.label: border color
parameters.description: Color expressed as an RGB value consisting of a list of three color values from 0 to 65535. ex: Blue = {0, 0, 65535} (Optional).

parameters.name: border style
parameters.label: border style
parameters.description: The type of border to be drawn (Optional).

parameters.name: border width
parameters.label: border width
parameters.description: Width of the border for a given border style (Optional).

parameters.name: font
parameters.label: font
parameters.description: The name of the font. Can be the PostScript name, such as: “TimesNewRomanPS-ItalicMT”, or display name: “Times New Roman Italic”.

parameters.name: foreground color
parameters.label: foreground color
parameters.description: Color expressed as an RGB value consisting of a list of three color values from 0 to 65535. ex: Blue = {0, 0, 65535} (Optional).

parameters.name: occurence
parameters.label: occurence
parameters.description: On what pages should the imprint occur (Optional).

parameters.name: outlined
parameters.label: outlined
parameters.description: The text will be drawn as an outline if true (Optional).

parameters.name: position
parameters.label: position
parameters.description: Specifies where the imprint will be drawn

parameters.name: rotation
parameters.label: rotation
parameters.description: Rotation value in degrees (Optional)

parameters.name: size
parameters.label: size
parameters.description: Size of the font.

parameters.name: strike through
parameters.label: strike through
parameters.description: The text is striked through if true (Optional).

parameters.name: text
parameters.label: text
parameters.description: The text, including any placeholders to imprint

parameters.name: underlined
parameters.label: underlined
parameters.description: The text is underlined if true (Optional).

parameters.name: x offset
parameters.label: x offset
parameters.description: An x offset in pixels from the position (Optional).

parameters.name: y offset
parameters.label: y offset
parameters.description: An y offset in pixels from the position (Optional).

parameters.name: waiting for reply
parameters.label: waiting for reply
parameters.description: Wait for reply (default) or perform the command in the background.

result_description: True if imprinting was successful, false if not.
